payload.answer: Detected the same Slack event ID delivered twice; no new memory will be written.

entity_resolution.reason: Duplicate delivery detected for the same Slack event ID (delivered twice). Preserve data integrity by writing once only; this payload does not add new information beyond what was already recorded on the first delivery.

details: Fixture slack_retry_event_001 indicates duplicate delivery of the same event.
No durable memory update performed to avoid duplicate facts.

repair_options: If the first delivery was not ingested, reprocess using a unique idempotency key tied to the Slack event ID (to ensure a single write).
Verify the prior ingestion record for slack_retry_event_001 to confirm whether the memory already exists.
